args.cypher:
// Find all AAS shells and their basic info
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
RETURN aas.idShort, aas.id, a.globalAssetId, a.assetKind
ORDER BY aas.idShort

// List submodels of Hall 4 with their semanticIds
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'Hall4'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN sm.idShort, sm.id, sc.id AS templateSemanticId

args.name: Hierarchical Structures enabling Bills of Material

args.cypher:
// Traverse the hierarchical structure of Hall 4 to find all entities and their relationships
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'Hall4'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE sm.idShort = 'HierarchicalStructures'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(e:Entity)
OPTIONAL MATCH (e)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
OPTIONAL MATCH (e)-[:HAS_SPECIFIC_ASSET_ID]->(sai:SpecificAssetId)
RETURN e.idShort, e.entityType, asset.globalAssetId, sai.name, sai.value

// Check which of the Hall 4 assets have AGV technical data (indicating they are transport robots)
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE sm.id = 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/SubmodelTemplate/technicaldataagv/1/0' OR sm.idShort IS NOT NULL
WITH aas, sm
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/SubmodelTemplate/technicaldataagv/1/0'})
WHERE sc IS NOT NULL
RETURN aas.idShort, aas.id, sm.idShort, sm.id

// For each asset in Hall 4, find its type shell and check if the type has AGV technical data
MATCH (instance:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:DERIVED_FROM]->(type:AssetAdministrationShell)
WHERE instance.idShort IN ['CRX10iA_001', 'MiR100_001', 'UR3e_002']
MATCH (type)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN instance.idShort AS instance, type.idShort AS typeShell, sm.idShort, sc.id AS semanticId

// Check the capability descriptions for CRX10iA and UR3e type shells to understand what they are
MATCH (type:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE type.idShort IN ['CRX10iA_Type', 'UR3e_Type'] AND sm.idShort = 'CapabilityDescription'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
WHERE el:idShort IS NOT NULL
RETURN type.idShort, el.idShort, labels(el) AS types, el.value

// Check the capability descriptions for MiR100 type shell
MATCH (type:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'MiR100_Type'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE sm.idShort = 'CapabilityDescription'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
RETURN el.idShort, labels(el) AS types, el.value

// Get nameplate details for MiR100_001
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'MiR100_001'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE sm.idShort = 'Nameplate'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
RETURN p.idShort, p.value

# AAS Graph Schema

args.cypher:
// First, let's see all AAS shells and their basic info
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
RETURN aas.idShort, aas.id, a.globalAssetId, a.assetKind
ORDER BY aas.idShort

// Look at Hall4's submodels to understand the structure
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'Hall4'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN sm.idShort, sm.id, sc.id AS semanticId

args.name: Hierarchical Structures enabling Bills of Material

args.cypher:
// Traverse Hall4's HierarchicalStructures to find contained assets via HasPart relationships
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'Hall4'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE sm.idShort = 'HierarchicalStructures'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(entry:Entity)
WHERE entry.idShort = 'EntryNode'
MATCH (entry)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(hasPart:RelationshipElement)
WHERE hasPart.idShort = 'HasPart'
MATCH (hasPart)-[:HAS_SECOND]->(target)
RETURN entry.idShort AS entryNode, hasPart.idShort AS relType, target.idShort AS targetIdShort, labels(target) AS targetLabels, target.smId AS targetSmId

// Broader traversal to see all elements in Hall4's HierarchicalStructures
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'Hall4'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE sm.idShort = 'HierarchicalStructures'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
RETURN el.idShort, labels(el), el.smId, el.idShortPath

// Check the AAS shells for these three assets to see their submodels and capabilities
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['CRX10iA_001', 'MiR100_001', 'UR3e_002']
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN aas.idShort, sm.idShort, sm.id, sc.id AS semanticId
ORDER BY aas.idShort, sm.idShort

// Check the type shells for capability descriptions to identify collaborative robots
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:DERIVED_FROM]->(type:AssetAdministrationShell)
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['CRX10iA_001', 'MiR100_001', 'UR3e_002']
MATCH (type)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN aas.idShort AS instance, type.idShort AS typeShell, sm.idShort, sc.id AS semanticId
ORDER BY instance, sm.idShort

args.name: Capability Description

args.cypher:
// Look at the Capability nodes in the type shells to understand what they are
MATCH (type:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE type.idShort IN ['CRX10iA_Type', 'UR3e_Type']
AND sm.idShort = 'CapabilityDescription'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(cap:Capability)
RETURN type.idShort AS typeShell, cap.idShort, cap.idShortPath

// Get nameplate properties for the type shells
MATCH (type:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE type.idShort IN ['CRX10iA_Type', 'UR3e_Type', 'MiR100_Type']
AND sm.idShort = 'Nameplate'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort IN ['Manufacturer', 'Model', 'DeviceKind', 'SerialNumber']
RETURN type.idShort AS typeShell, p.idShort, p.value
ORDER BY typeShell, p.idShort

// Get all properties from the Nameplate submodels
MATCH (type:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE type.idShort IN ['CRX10iA_Type', 'UR3e_Type', 'MiR100_Type']
AND sm.idShort = 'Nameplate'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
RETURN type.idShort AS typeShell, el.idShort, labels(el), el.value
ORDER BY typeShell, el.idShort

// Get MultiLanguageProperty values for manufacturer name and product type
MATCH (type:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE type.idShort IN ['CRX10iA_Type', 'UR3e_Type']
AND sm.idShort = 'Nameplate'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(mlp:MultiLanguageProperty)
MATCH (mlp)-[:HAS_VALUE]->(ls:LangString)
WHERE mlp.idShort IN ['ManufacturerName', 'ManufacturerProductType', 'ManufacturerProductFamily']
RETURN type.idShort AS typeShell, mlp.idShort, ls.language, ls.text
ORDER BY typeShell, mlp.idShort

args.cypher:
// Find all assets in Hall 4 via the HierarchicalStructures submodel
MATCH (hall:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'Hall4'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE sm.idShort = 'HierarchicalStructures'

// Traverse the hierarchy to find all child entities with SameAs relationships
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(node:Entity)
OPTIONAL MATCH (node)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(sameAs:RelationshipElement)
WHERE sameAs.idShort = 'SameAs'
OPTIONAL MATCH (sameAs)-[:HAS_SECOND]->(target)

RETURN hall.idShort AS hall, node.idShort AS nodeIdShort, target.id AS targetId, target.idShort AS targetIdShort

MATCH (hall:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'Hall4'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE sm.idShort = 'HierarchicalStructures'

// Get all elements in this submodel
MATCH path = (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)

RETURN el.idShort, labels(el) AS types, el.smId
ORDER BY el.idShort
LIMIT 100

// Check which of these assets are collaborative robots by looking at their CapabilityDescription submodels

WHERE cap.idShort = 'Capability'
OPTIONAL MATCH (cap)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)

RETURN aas.idShort AS instanceIdShort, typeAAS.idShort AS typeIdShort, capSm.idShort AS capSmIdShort, el.idShort AS elementIdShort, labels(el) AS types
